intent: Fix the Files UI bug where selecting one file or folder makes the group selection control look fully selected.
assumptions: The issue is visual state drift in group checkbox styling, not backend data or selection mutation.
The mixed state means partial selection and must be visually distinct from checked.
Existing layout, grouping, sorting, card behavior, and batch selection behavior must remain unchanged.
The active worktree already contains unrelated dirty changes that must not be reverted.
risks: Group checkboxes are shared by type, pinned, folder, and time groups.
Existing full frontend tests may have unrelated failures from the dirty worktree.
steps: Trace group selection state from item click to group checkbox class.
Add a RED regression test proving mixed is not allowed inside the checked fill CSS rule.
Move fileListGroupSelectCheckboxMixed out of the checked rule and into the neutral group-control treatment.
Run focused FileList tests, lint, build, and browser validation when practical.
Add a permanent constraint and update docs/quality-score.md.
nonGoals: No layout, sizing, sort, grouping, or data-fetching changes.
No new selection model or card interaction behavior.
